name: Winston Lin
title: Developer platforms, serverless, and infrastructure
tagline: Most of my work has been in CI/CD, Kubernetes, and serverless. I still like building small Python tools when it helps make something clearer or easier to use.
intro_paragraphs: Most of my work sits somewhere between product, infrastructure, and developer experience. Over the last several years I have worked on CI/CD, Kubernetes, and serverless platforms inside OCI.
This is a simple place to keep the parts of that work that translate well in public: case studies, a few notes on platform work, and small Python projects I would actually want to maintain.
Some of the writing here first shows up on Oracle Blogs. Some of it starts as rough notes and gets cleaned up later. I would rather it be useful than polished.
focus_areas: Migration readiness and practical product strategy
AI products that need trust and operational clarity
experience_highlights: Principal Product Manager for OCI Functions, focused on platform primitives, developer experience, and execution model
Previously led product work across OCI Kubernetes Engine and OCI DevOps / CI/CD
Built and launched internal platform capabilities that shortened delivery cycles and reduced operational drag
I tend to do my best work where product clarity and technical depth both matter
now_items: Writing more openly about developer platform work
Turning real workflow pain into small public Python tools
Building a body of migration and DX notes that are actually readable
